    Why I am starting this website

    April 23, 2025 less than 1 minute read

    This is my first post and should consistute the first of many more to come. I have decided to start this website as a way to document my life in one coherent place. My goal is to document personal projects, hobbies, and anything else I may find interesting and worthwhile sharing with others and myself.

    Updated: April 23, 2025
